creator: pluknet@gmail.com
text:
this patch helps to build www/mod_ntlm on OSVERSION >= 700042 (with gcc 4.2.1)
I have at least one positive response from testers.

Fix: Apply the patch against www/mod_ntlm/

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: run 'make' to see that: "Does not compile with GCC 4.2"
